articles.title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
articles.summary: OpenAI releases a Child Safety Blueprint providing a framework for building AI systems with age-appropriate design and safeguards. The blueprint emphasizes collaboration to protect and empower young people online.

articles.title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
articles.summary: Anthropic introduces Mythos, a new AI model designed for cybersecurity applications. The model is being made available to a select group of companies for defensive cybersecurity work.

articles.title: MedGemma 1.5 Technical Report
articles.summary: Google introduces MedGemma 1.5 4B, expanding medical AI capabilities to include high-dimensional medical imaging, anatomical localization, and improved document understanding. The model integrates CT/MRI analysis and electronic health record processing.

articles.title: The vibes are off at OpenAI
articles.summary: Despite closing $122 billion in funding at an $852 billion valuation and potential IPO plans, OpenAI faces internal challenges. Recent executive reshufflings and discontinued projects raise questions about the company's stability.

articles.title: What the heck is wrong with our AI overlords?
articles.summary: A critical examination of AI industry leadership and practices. The article provides insights into broader industry dynamics and leadership challenges.

articles.title: Testing suggests Google's AI Overviews tell millions of lies per hour
articles.summary: Analysis reveals Google's AI Overviews feature has a 10% error rate, raising questions about accuracy in search results. The findings highlight concerns about AI reliability in information retrieval.

articles.title: Microsoft's war on Windows' Control Panel is taking so long
articles.summary: Microsoft has been trying to phase out the Control Panel since Windows 8 in 2012, but complexity in migrating settings continues to delay the transition. The process requires careful handling of numerous legacy components.

articles.title: A mathematical theory of evolution for self-designing AIs
articles.summary: Researchers establish theoretical foundations for AI evolution through recursive self-improvement. The paper extends mathematical theories of biological evolution to artificial intelligence systems.

articles.title: Simulating the Evolution of Alignment and Values in Machine Intelligence
articles.summary: Study examines how model alignment evolves in populations over time using evolutionary theory. The research focuses on belief systems and their impact on AI model populations.

articles.title: Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution
articles.summary: Argues that current AI evaluation methods focused on behavioral outputs are insufficient. Proposes a shift toward cognitive evaluation approaches for better understanding AI capabilities.

articles.title: Auditable Agents
articles.summary: Introduces framework for making LLM agents accountable and auditable after deployment. Distinguishes between accountability, auditability, and auditing in AI systems that can take real-world actions.

articles.title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
articles.summary: Confluence now supports visual asset creation and third-party AI agents from Lovable, Replit, and Gamma. These integrations enhance collaborative document creation with AI assistance.

articles.title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
articles.summary: Google released an offline AI dictation app using Gemma AI models for iOS. The app competes with services like Wispr Flow by providing local, private voice-to-text capabilities.

articles.title: GLM-5.1: Towards Long-Horizon Tasks
articles.summary: Simon Willison discusses the new GLM-5.1 model and its capabilities for long-horizon tasks.

articles.title: Anthropic's Project Glasswing - restricting Claude Mythos to security researchers - sounds necessary to me
articles.summary: Commentary on Anthropic's decision to limit access to Claude Mythos model to security researchers only.
